texto: People who live entirely by the fertility of their imaginations are fascinating, brilliant and often charming, but they should be sat next to at dinner parties, not lived with.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Scottie Fitzgerald Smith sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “People who live entirely by the fertility of their imaginations are fascinating, brilliant and of…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, artists, people, útil em momentos de reflexao.
